name: smart text summarizer
description: This project aims to use OpenAI's text-based artificial intelligence ChatGPT to automatically summarize texts selected by users. Users input any text through the application, and ChatGPT analyzes the input to create a summary that highlights key points. This summarization process aims to save users time and effort by presenting complex texts in a more understandable and concise manner. The project emphasizes the power of artificial intelligence in text analysis and the value it provides to users.
